name: Mutual Non-Disclosure Agreement
description: Bilateral NDA for protecting confidential information shared during business discussions, partnerships, or transactions.
systemPromptIntro: You are a friendly legal assistant helping a user create a Mutual Non-Disclosure Agreement (MNDA) between two parties (Party A and Party B, both mutual disclosing parties). Instead of a form, you collect the required details through a natural, freeform conversation.

fields.label: Representative
fields.promptHint: Name of the person signing for Party A

fields.label: Representative
fields.promptHint: Name of the person signing for Party B

fields.label: Term
fields.promptHint: Duration of the agreement, e.g. '2 years'

fields.label: Confidentiality Term
fields.promptHint: How long confidentiality survives, e.g. '3 years'

fields.label: Purpose
fields.promptHint: Why confidential information is being shared (>= 10 chars)

fields.label: Governing Law
fields.promptHint: Full U.S. state name whose law governs

name: Design Partner Agreement
description: Agreement for early access design partner programs, including feedback obligations, intellectual property rights, and confidentiality terms.
systemPromptIntro: You are a friendly legal assistant helping a user create a Design Partner Agreement between a Provider and a Partner, giving the Partner early access to a product in exchange for feedback. You collect the required details through a natural, freeform conversation.

fields.label: Representative
fields.promptHint: Name of the person signing for the Provider

fields.label: Representative
fields.promptHint: Name of the person signing for the Partner

fields.label: Term
fields.promptHint: How long the program runs, e.g. '6 months'

fields.label: Product
fields.promptHint: Description of the Product the Partner gets early access to

fields.label: Fees
fields.promptHint: Fees the Partner pays, if any (e.g. 'None' or '$5,000')

fields.label: Governing Law
fields.promptHint: Full U.S. state name whose law governs

name: Pilot Agreement
description: Agreement for pilot programs allowing customers to evaluate a product before entering into a definitive agreement.
systemPromptIntro: You are a friendly legal assistant helping a user create a Pilot Agreement between a Provider and a Customer, letting the Customer evaluate a product for a limited pilot period. You collect the required details through a natural, freeform conversation.

fields.label: Representative
fields.promptHint: Name of the person signing for the Provider

fields.label: Representative
fields.promptHint: Name of the person signing for the Customer

fields.label: Pilot Period
fields.promptHint: Length of the pilot/evaluation period, e.g. '60 days'

fields.label: Product
fields.promptHint: Description of the Product being evaluated

fields.label: Evaluation Purpose
fields.promptHint: What the Customer is evaluating the Product for

fields.label: Liability Cap
fields.promptHint: General liability cap amount, e.g. 'fees paid' or '$10,000'

fields.label: Governing Law
fields.promptHint: Full U.S. state name whose law governs

name: Business Associate Agreement
description: HIPAA-compliant agreement for business associates handling protected health information (PHI), including obligations, safeguards, and breach notification requirements.
systemPromptIntro: You are a friendly legal assistant helping a user create a HIPAA Business Associate Agreement between a Business Associate (the service provider) and a Covered Entity (the customer). You collect the required details through a natural, freeform conversation.

fields.label: Representative
fields.promptHint: Name of the person signing for the Business Associate

fields.label: Representative
fields.promptHint: Name of the person signing for the Covered Entity

fields.label: Effective Date
fields.promptHint: BAA effective date in YYYY-MM-DD format

fields.label: Underlying Agreement
fields.promptHint: The underlying agreement this BAA supports, e.g. 'Cloud Service Agreement dated 2026-01-01'

fields.label: Breach Notification Period
fields.promptHint: Time to notify of a breach, e.g. '30 days'

fields.label: Permitted Uses & Limitations
fields.promptHint: Permitted uses of PHI and any limitations (offshoring, de-identification, aggregation) — free text

fields.label: Governing Law
fields.promptHint: Full U.S. state name whose law governs

name: Cloud Service Agreement
description: Comprehensive agreement for cloud-based software-as-a-service products, covering access, usage, support, data rights, and liability.
systemPromptIntro: You are a friendly legal assistant helping a user create a Cloud Service Agreement between a Provider and a Customer for a subscription SaaS product. You collect the required details through a natural, freeform conversation.

fields.label: Representative
fields.promptHint: Name of the person signing for the Provider

fields.label: Representative
fields.promptHint: Name of the person signing for the Customer

fields.label: Cloud Service
fields.promptHint: Description of the Cloud Service being provided

fields.label: Liability Cap
fields.promptHint: General liability cap amount, e.g. 'fees paid in the prior 12 months'

fields.label: Governing Law
fields.promptHint: Full U.S. state name whose law governs

name: Data Processing Agreement
description: GDPR-compliant data processing agreement covering controller/processor relationships, subprocessor requirements, international transfers, and security incident response.
systemPromptIntro: You are a friendly legal assistant helping a user create a Data Processing Agreement between a Provider (the data Processor) and a Customer (the data Controller). You collect the required details through a natural, freeform conversation.

fields.label: Representative
fields.promptHint: Name of the person signing for the Provider

fields.label: Representative
fields.promptHint: Name of the person signing for the Customer

fields.label: Nature of Processing
fields.promptHint: Subject matter, nature, purpose and duration of processing; categories of personal data and data subjects (free text)

fields.label: Approved Subprocessors
fields.promptHint: List of approved subprocessors, their locations, and processing tasks — or 'none' (free text)

fields.label: Security Measures
fields.promptHint: Technical and organizational security measures (free text)

fields.label: Governing Law
fields.promptHint: Full U.S. state name (or country) whose law governs

name: Partnership Agreement
description: Agreement for partnership arrangements, covering obligations, payment terms, trademark licensing, and intellectual property rights.
systemPromptIntro: You are a friendly legal assistant helping a user create a Partnership Agreement between a Company and a Partner, covering obligations, payment, and trademark licensing. You collect the required details through a natural, freeform conversation.

fields.label: Representative
fields.promptHint: Name of the person signing for the Company

fields.label: Representative
fields.promptHint: Name of the person signing for the Partner

fields.label: End Date
fields.promptHint: When the partnership ends, e.g. '2027-01-01' or 'ongoing until terminated'

fields.label: Obligations
fields.promptHint: Each party's obligations under the partnership (free text)

fields.label: Fees & Payment
fields.promptHint: Fees, payment schedule, and payment process (free text)

fields.label: Trademark & Brand
fields.promptHint: Brand elements, territory, and brand-usage guidelines (free text)

fields.label: Governing Law
fields.promptHint: Full U.S. state name whose law governs

name: Professional Services Agreement
description: Agreement for professional services engagements, covering deliverables, statements of work, payment terms, and intellectual property transfer.
systemPromptIntro: You are a friendly legal assistant helping a user create a Professional Services Agreement between a Provider and a Customer, covering services, deliverables, and payment. You collect the required details through a natural, freeform conversation.

fields.label: Representative
fields.promptHint: Name of the person signing for the Provider

fields.label: Representative
fields.promptHint: Name of the person signing for the Customer

fields.label: Services
fields.promptHint: Summary of the statement of work: services, deliverables, timeline (free text)

fields.label: Fees & Payment
fields.promptHint: Fees, invoicing cadence, and payment terms (free text)

fields.label: Governing Law
fields.promptHint: Full U.S. state name whose law governs

name: Service Level Agreement
description: Agreement defining service level commitments, uptime targets, response times, and remedies including service credits.
systemPromptIntro: You are a friendly legal assistant helping a user create a Service Level Agreement between a Provider and a Customer, defining uptime and support commitments with service-credit remedies. You collect the required details through a natural, freeform conversation.

fields.label: Representative
fields.promptHint: Name of the person signing for the Provider

fields.label: Representative
fields.promptHint: Name of the person signing for the Customer

fields.label: Cloud Service
fields.promptHint: The Cloud Service the SLA covers

fields.label: Target Response Time
fields.promptHint: Support response time commitment, e.g. '4 business hours'

fields.label: Support Channel
fields.promptHint: Where the Customer submits support requests, e.g. an email or portal

fields.label: Service Credits
fields.promptHint: How service credits are calculated, capped, and requested (free text)

fields.label: Governing Law
fields.promptHint: Full U.S. state name whose law governs

name: Software License Agreement
description: Agreement for software licensing, covering license grants, restrictions, payment, updates, and termination terms.
systemPromptIntro: You are a friendly legal assistant helping a user create a Software License Agreement between a Provider and a Customer, covering the license grant, permitted uses, and payment. You collect the required details through a natural, freeform conversation.

fields.label: Representative
fields.promptHint: Name of the person signing for the Provider

fields.label: Representative
fields.promptHint: Name of the person signing for the Customer

fields.label: Software
fields.promptHint: Description of the Software and Documentation being licensed

fields.label: Permitted Uses
fields.promptHint: Permitted uses and scope of the license (free text)

fields.label: Governing Law
fields.promptHint: Full U.S. state name whose law governs

name: AI Addendum
description: Standard terms for artificial intelligence and machine learning services, addressing AI-specific risks, model training, and output ownership.
systemPromptIntro: You are a friendly legal assistant helping a user create an AI Addendum between a Provider and a Customer that supplements an existing agreement with AI/ML-specific terms about training data and model use. You collect the required details through a natural, freeform conversation.

fields.label: Representative
fields.promptHint: Name of the person signing for the Provider

fields.label: Representative
fields.promptHint: Name of the person signing for the Customer

fields.label: Underlying Agreement
fields.promptHint: The base agreement this AI Addendum supplements, e.g. 'Cloud Service Agreement dated 2026-01-01'

fields.label: Training Data
fields.promptHint: What data the Provider may use for training (free text)

fields.label: Training Purposes
fields.promptHint: Purposes for which the Provider may use the Training Data (free text)

fields.label: Training Restrictions
fields.promptHint: Restrictions on training and model improvement (free text)

fields.label: Governing Law
fields.promptHint: Full U.S. state name whose law governs
